title: Draft Version 23: Swap CETA and HOPE logos in navbar, hero, and footer

requirements.summary: Replace existing CETA logo with CETA-3.png in navbar, hero section, and footer
acceptanceCriteria: The new CETA-3.png logo appears in the navbar where the old CETA logo was displayed
The new CETA-3.png logo appears in the hero section where the old CETA logo was displayed
The new CETA-3.png logo appears in the footer where the old CETA logo was displayed
No other visual or functional changes are made relative to Version 5

file_operations.description: Update the CETA logo image source to reference frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-3.png, preserving the existing size, position, className, and alt text. Locate the current CETA logo img element and replace only its src attribute.

Update the CETA logo image source to reference frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-3.png, preserving the existing size, position, className, and alt text. Locate the current CETA logo img element within the logo row and replace only its src attribute.

Update the CETA logo image source to reference frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-3.png, preserving the existing size, position, className, and alt text. Locate the current CETA logo img element and replace only its src attribute.

requirements.summary: Replace existing HOPE logo with HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png in navbar, hero section, and footer
acceptanceCriteria: The new HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png logo appears in the navbar where the old HOPE logo was displayed
The new HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png logo appears in the hero section where the old HOPE logo was displayed
The new HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png logo appears in the footer where the old HOPE logo was displayed
No other visual or functional changes are made relative to Version 5

file_operations.description: Update the HOPE logo image source to reference frontend/public/assets/generated/HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png, preserving the existing size, position, className, and alt text. Locate the current HOPE logo img element and replace only its src attribute.

Update the HOPE logo image source to reference frontend/public/assets/generated/HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png, preserving the existing size, position, className, and alt text. Locate the current HOPE logo img element within the logo row and replace only its src attribute.

Update the HOPE logo image source to reference frontend/public/assets/generated/HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png, preserving the existing size, position, className, and alt text. Locate the current HOPE logo img element and replace only its src attribute.

requirements.summary: Verify CETA-3.png and HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png are available as static assets and components reference them correctly
acceptanceCriteria: HOPE logo is accessible at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with a clean filename
All three components reference these static paths correctly and images load without errors

file_operations.description: Verify that both logo image paths are correctly set to frontend/public/assets/generated/CETA-3.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/HOPE_Logo_0-Photoroom-2.png after the updates in REQ-1 and REQ-2. Test that images load without 404 errors.
